text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, May 03. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
